name: <OnEthRawPacket>
title: <OnEthRawPacket>
syntax: void <OnEthRawPacket>( long channel, long dir, long packetLength );
description: The function is called when a registered raw Ethernet packet is received.
Within this callback function the following functions can be used to retrieve the received packet data:
The functions access the raw Ethernet data. Offset 0 starts at the beginning of the Ethernet header.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Ethernet channel on which the packet was received
